name: THYROID GLAND
definition: small temporary channel along which thyroid primordium descends in midline of neck to its
dominant_finding: mildly increased attenuation of 70 HU ± 10 relative to adjacent muscle ← intrinsic
discriminating_features: homogeneous mildly hyperattenuating relative to surrounding neck musculature with an
mildly increased attenuation of 70 HU ± 10 relative to adjacent muscle ← intrinsic
islands of low attenuation within ectopic thyroid tissue = clue to diagnosis of ectopic
